title: LSP project explorer and project graph pipeline

source.subject: feat: workspace templates, LSP project explorer, and project graph pipeline

body:
## Outcome

Workspace templates, LSP project explorer, and project graph pipeline.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **LSP workspace & project graph** (`v02-lsp-workspace`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`6ae272b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/6ae272b) — feat: workspace templates, LSP project explorer, and project graph pipeline
